assertions.title: Rotate Keyset Error — Wrong Password renders with Retry CTA

steps.expected: Wrong-password error variant renders with stepper, Back link, Source Share Error copy, red wrong-password banner, amber relay-backup banner, and Retry CTA.
steps.observed: Page rendered all required copy and controls; interactive snapshot included Back and Retry buttons.
No agent-browser page errors; console had only Vite debug + React DevTools informational message.

evidence.consoleErrors: none (no agent-browser errors; only non-error Vite debug + React DevTools info)

assertions.reason: All required wrong-password error-state elements and Retry CTA were present and matched the contract.

assertions.title: Rotate Keyset Error — Group Mismatch renders without top BackLink

steps.expected: Group mismatch variant renders with no top BackLink, mismatch card, explanatory copy, and Back to Source Intake CTA.
steps.observed: Group mismatch copy and CTA rendered; interactive snapshot showed no in-flow Back link, only Back to Source Intake button.
No agent-browser page errors; console had only Vite debug + React DevTools informational message.

evidence.consoleErrors: none (no agent-browser errors; only non-error Vite debug + React DevTools info)

assertions.reason: The group-mismatch error screen matched required content and omitted the top BackLink as specified.

assertions.title: Rotate Keyset Error — Generation Failed renders phase list

steps.expected: Generation-failed variant renders Back link, failure description, full phase list with reconstruct-signing-key failed, reassurance banner, and Retry Generation CTA.
steps.observed: All required phase rows and reassurance text were visible with Retry Generation CTA.
No agent-browser page errors; console had only Vite debug + React DevTools informational message.

evidence.consoleErrors: none (no agent-browser errors; only non-error Vite debug + React DevTools info)

assertions.reason: Generation-failed error page contained the required four-phase status list and retry messaging.

assertions.title: Error retry CTAs navigate correctly

steps.action: From /demo/rotate-keyset-error-group-mismatch, click Back to Source Intake
Capture destination screenshots and check browser errors
steps.observed: All destination screenshots captured; no agent-browser page errors and only non-error Vite/React DevTools console messages.

evidence.consoleErrors: none (no agent-browser errors; only non-error Vite debug + React DevTools info)

assertions.reason: All three retry-path CTAs routed to the exact destinations required by the contract.

summary: Tested 4 assigned rotate-keyset assertions; 4 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Error-variant rendering and retry navigation destinations matched the contract.
